markets.question: Celtic FC vs. Motherwell FC: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Scottish Premiership game between Celtic FC and Motherwell FC, scheduled for March 14 at 11:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Celtic FC and Motherwell FC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on spfl.co.uk. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Celtic FC vs. Motherwell FC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming Scottish Premiership game between Celtic FC and Motherwell FC, scheduled for March 14 at 11:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Celtic FC and Motherwell FC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

markets.question: Will Bitmine announce an Ethereum purchase March 3 - March 9?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Bitmine announces that they have acquired additional Ethereum between the dates in the title (from 12:00 AM ET on the first date to 11:59 PM ET on the last date). Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

This market will resolve based on announcements made within the market's designated time frame regardless of when the actual purchases were made.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Bitmine or Tom Lee.

For reference, Bitmine's reported ETH holdings can be tracked at: https://defillama.com/digital-asset-treasury/bmnr
